# aditya-verma.me

This is the personal portfolio website of Aditya Verma (YoungCoder45).

## Primary URL
https://aditya-verma.me/

## What this site contains
- About: background and mission
- Skills/Tech Stack: tools and technologies
- Projects: featured projects with links
- Experience: timeline + stats
- Community: Discord community details
- Writing: links to blog/articles
- Contact: contact form and social links

## Navigation
This is a single-page site. Use section anchors:
- https://aditya-verma.me/#about
- https://aditya-verma.me/#skills
- https://aditya-verma.me/#projects
- https://aditya-verma.me/#experience
- https://aditya-verma.me/#community
- https://aditya-verma.me/#blog
- https://aditya-verma.me/#contact

## Sitemap
https://aditya-verma.me/sitemap.xml

## Notes
- Preferred language: English
- Contact: use the contact form at #contact
